root_cause_summary.description: Concise explanation of why recent iterations have failed.

problem_reframing.description: Restated version of the problem from a higher level of abstraction.

alternate_strategies.description: List of potential new approaches to resolve the blockage.

approach.description: Description of an alternate technical or conceptual approach.

rationale.description: Reason why this approach may succeed where previous ones failed.

recommended_next_agent.description: Name of the agent that should handle this next.

recommended_strategy_index.description: Index of the chosen strategy in the alternate_strategies list.

justification_for_recommendation.description: Explanation of why the chosen strategy is best.
